name: Sam
profile: Returning to fitness after several years away, new to structured logging.
goals: Build a sustainable workout and meal logging habit
Get early, easy-to-understand insights without overwhelming detail
Track how consistency changes energy and mood over time

logging_pattern.summary: Starts with very sparse logs, then increases frequency and detail over time.
timeline: Days 1–10: 1–2 simple entries/day, few feelings recorded
Days 11–20: 3–4 entries/day with feelings before and after
Days 21+: Consistent detailed logging across workouts and meals
